title: A Weekly Data Cleaning Checklist for Business Exports
summary: Weekly exports deserve a cleaning checklist before charts—not heroic fixes at month end.

content.summary: Weekly exports deserve a cleaning checklist before charts—not heroic fixes at month end.

body.text: Consistent cleaning beats quarterly fire drills. Upload, preview types, check row count, scan nulls in keys, dedupe tests, standardize dates, sanity-check totals. Apply saved rules only after raw file passes checks—or note exclusions explicitly.

body.caption: Team meeting with presentation screen. Photo: Unsplash

body.text: Upload, preview types, check row count, scan nulls in keys, dedupe tests, standardize dates, sanity-check totals.
Apply saved rules only after raw file passes checks—or note exclusions explicitly.

items: Compare schema to prior week for new columns.
Archive cleaning notes with export filename.
Run one distribution chart to spot outliers.

body.text: Checklists shorten meetings because metrics start trustworthy.
New hires onboard faster with written steps tied to Datilio upload flow.
Datilio preview, filters, and charts support every item on a practical weekly cleaning checklist.

meta_description: Weekly exports deserve a cleaning checklist before charts—not heroic fixes at month end.
